description: '''Hipdut''' or '''hip-dut''' is an Indonesian fusion genre that combines elements of [[hip hop music|hip hop]] and ''[[dangdut]]''. It is commonly associated with rap or sung vocals over dangdut, [[Dangdut koplo|koplo]], electronic, or trap-influenced arrangements. Although the combination of dangdut and hip-hop elements predates the term's wider circulation, the name gained broader public attention after the 2024 single "[[Garam & Madu (Sakit Dadaku)]]" by [[Tenxi]], [[Jemsii]], and [[Naykilla]].
